Petition To Remove Administrator And For Surcharge Against Beneficial Share And Reduction Of Statutory Compensation [Pc Section 8500]
Off Calendar Sep-07-2016 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-29-2016 Continued To Sep-19-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Connie Yi for (petitioner) Bernadine Lee. Joseph Fenton for Jennifer Chung.

The Court stated that there are a number of questions brought up by the probate examiner. Ms. Yi stated that in regards to the 2015 & 2016 taxes the original petition only addressed the unpaid 2016 taxes, that they have now filed an extension for the 2015 taxes, that the taxes are now ready to file, that they requested a reserve of $5000.00 for tax and interest and that the examiner wanted a copy of the tax return which they will provide. The Court stated that the examiner indicated that they are to file a document showing the amount of tax due as well as interest. Ms. Yi stated that they will file it. The Court stated that there is an issue regarding bond. Ms. Yi stated that a payment of $1975.00 was made this month, that they will need to adjust the distribution amount and that they will need to file an amendment. The Court reminded counsel that an amendment to the petition will need to be noticed properly, that it will continue the matter for proper notice but that it will agree to a preliminary distribution to the wife. Ms. Yi stated that in regards to a preliminary distribution the second amendment is not correct. Mr. Fenton expressed concern regarding the distribution stating that they are concerned that the 2012 & 2013 taxes were not paid, that the Inventory & Appraisal shows date of death values, that there is no indication regarding interest between then and now on the accounts, that it is incomplete and that the interest owed should not be a penalty to the heirs. The Court stated that it will adjust accordingly when it reviews the petition. Ms. Yi stated that 2013 & 2014 taxes were not filed as there was no income except $300.00 in interest, that the 2015 tax due in the amount of $397.00 is due to an annuity that was cashed in 2015 and that a 1099 was received. The Accounting petition was bifurcated to allow preliminary distribution to the wife and the remaining issues were continued to September 19, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-22-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Connie Yi for Petitioner.

Ms. Yi confirmed that no one has objected and that no one with higher priority is seeking to be appointed. Ms. Yi also stated that she has not had any direct contact with the surviving spouse, that the sister of the spouse made contact with her to collect the spouse's personal property, that the sister has also been in communication with an attorney and that she received an e mail from that attorney stating that they were okay as long the spouse receives half of the property. The Court granted the petition for letters of administration (order for the same signed in open Court). Bond in the amount of $355,000.00 is required.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-08-2014 Continued To Dec-22-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
